Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = Auctionator.Constants.Durations.Short; self.value = 12
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = Auctionator.Constants.Durations.Medium; self.value = 24
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonMixin); self:OnLoad(); self:OnLoad(); self.labelText = Auctionator.Constants.Durations.Long; self.value = 48
Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigRadioButtonGroupMixin); Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigHorizontalRadioButtonGroupMixin); self:InitializeRadioButtonGroup(); self.groupHeadingText = AUCTIONATOR_L_DURATION
